mapper.sql: supplier_id, supplier_id supplierId, supplier_name, supplier_name supplierName, supplier_code, supplier_code supplierCode, status, sort_order, sort_order sortOrder, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select: select from purchase_supplier where del_flag = '0' and supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%') and status = #{status} order by sort_order asc, supplier_id desc
select from purchase_supplier where supplier_id = #{supplierId} and del_flag = '0'
select from purchase_supplier where supplier_name = #{supplierName} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select s.supplier_id, s.supplier_id supplierId, s.supplier_name, s.supplier_name supplierName, s.supplier_code, s.supplier_code supplierCode from purchase_supplier_alias a inner join purchase_supplier s on s.supplier_id = a.supplier_id and s.del_flag = '0' where a.alias_name = #{aliasName} and a.status = '0' and a.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_supplier(supplier_name, supplier_code, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{supplierName}, #{supplierCode}, ifnull(#{status}, '0'), ifnull(#{sortOrder}, 0), #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update purchase_supplier set del_flag='2', update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where supplier_id in #{id}
mapper.select: select a.alias_id, a.alias_id aliasId, a.supplier_id, a.supplier_id supplierId, s.supplier_name, s.supplier_name supplierName, a.alias_name, a.alias_name aliasName, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from purchase_supplier_alias a left join purchase_supplier s on s.supplier_id = a.supplier_id where a.del_flag='0' and a.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and a.alias_name like concat('%', #{aliasName}, '%') order by a.alias_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_supplier_alias(supplier_id, alias_name, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{supplierId}, #{aliasName}, ifnull(#{status}, '0'), #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update purchase_supplier_alias set del_flag='2', update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where alias_id in #{id}
mapper.sql: manual_order_id, manual_order_id manualOrderId, supplier_id, supplier_id supplierId, supplier_name_snapshot, supplier_name_snapshot supplierNameSnapshot, active_unique_key, active_unique_key activeUniqueKey, order_date, order_date orderDate, order_no, order_no orderNo, product_model, product_model productModel, unit_price, unit_price unitPrice, quantity, total_amount, total_amount totalAmount, customer_name, customer_name customerName, customer_phone, customer_phone customerPhone, customer_address, customer_address customerAddress, order_remark, order_remark orderRemark, logistics_no, logistics_no logisticsNo, after_sale_flag, after_sale_flag afterSaleFlag, after_sale_request, after_sale_request afterSaleRequest, balance_amount, balance_amount balanceAmount, receipt_status, receipt_status receiptStatus, payment_amount, payment_amount paymentAmount, invoice_status, invoice_status invoiceStatus, reconciliation_status, reconciliation_status reconciliationStatus, amount_check_status, amount_check_status amountCheckStatus, data_status, data_status dataStatus, upload_user_id, upload_user_id uploadUserId, upload_user_name, upload_user_name uploadUserName, upload_time, upload_time uploadTime, latest_upload_user_id, latest_upload_user_id latestUploadUserId, latest_upload_user_name, latest_upload_user_name latestUploadUserName, latest_upload_time, latest_upload_time latestUploadTime, source_file_name, source_file_name sourceFileName, latest_source_file_name, latest_source_file_name latestSourceFileName, import_batch_id, import_batch_id importBatchId, latest_import_batch_id, latest_import_batch_id latestImportBatchId, source_row_number, source_row_number sourceRowNumber, latest_source_row_number, latest_source_row_number latestSourceRowNumber, create_by, create_by createBy, create_time, create_time createTime, update_by, update_by updateBy, update_time, update_time updateTime, remark, del_flag, del_flag delFlag
mapper.select: select from purchase_manual_order where manual_order_id=#{manualOrderId} and del_flag='0'
select from purchase_manual_order where active_unique_key=#{activeUniqueKey} and del_flag='0' limit 1
select from purchase_manual_order where supplier_id=#{supplierId} and order_no=#{orderNo} and del_flag='0'
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_manual_order( supplier_id, supplier_name_snapshot, active_unique_key, order_date, order_no, product_model, unit_price, quantity, total_amount, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_address, order_remark, logistics_no, after_sale_flag, after_sale_request, balance_amount, receipt_status, payment_amount, invoice_status, reconciliation_status, amount_check_status, data_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, latest_upload_user_id, latest_upload_user_name, latest_upload_time, source_file_name, latest_source_file_name, import_batch_id, latest_import_batch_id, source_row_number, latest_source_row_number, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{supplierId}, #{supplierNameSnapshot}, #{activeUniqueKey}, #{orderDate}, #{orderNo}, #{productModel}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{customerAddress}, #{orderRemark}, #{logisticsNo}, #{afterSaleFlag}, #{afterSaleRequest}, #{balanceAmount}, #{receiptStatus}, #{paymentAmount}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{reconciliationStatus}, #{amountCheckStatus}, #{dataStatus}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, sysdate(), #{latestUploadUserId}, #{latestUploadUserName}, sysdate(), #{sourceFileName}, #{latestSourceFileName}, #{importBatchId}, #{latestImportBatchId}, #{sourceRowNumber}, #{latestSourceRowNumber}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update purchase_manual_order set product_model=if(product_model is null or product_model='', #{productModel}, product_model), logistics_no=if(logistics_no is null or logistics_no='', #{logisticsNo}, logistics_no), customer_phone=if(customer_phone is null or customer_phone='', #{customerPhone}, customer_phone), latest_upload_user_id=#{latestUploadUserId}, latest_upload_user_name=#{latestUploadUserName}, latest_upload_time=sysdate(), latest_source_file_name=#{latestSourceFileName}, latest_import_batch_id=#{latestImportBatchId}, latest_source_row_number=#{latestSourceRowNumber}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where manual_order_id=#{manualOrderId}
update purchase_manual_order set del_flag='2', active_unique_key=concat(active_unique_key, '|DEL|', manual_order_id), update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where manual_order_id in #{id}
mapper.sql: summary_id, summary_id summaryId, document_supplier_id, document_supplier_id documentSupplierId, document_supplier_name, document_supplier_name documentSupplierName, active_unique_key, active_unique_key activeUniqueKey, purchase_order_remark, purchase_order_remark purchaseOrderRemark, contract_remark, contract_remark contractRemark, merchant_code, merchant_code merchantCode, purchase_quantity, purchase_quantity purchaseQuantity, matched_logistics_no, matched_logistics_no matchedLogisticsNo, original_logistics_no, original_logistics_no originalLogisticsNo, shipping_check_status, shipping_check_status shippingCheckStatus, exception_reason, exception_reason exceptionReason, purchaser_remark, purchaser_remark purchaserRemark, matched_order_id, matched_order_id matchedOrderId, match_status, match_status matchStatus, match_time, match_time matchTime, match_type, match_type matchType, match_message, match_message matchMessage, last_match_time, last_match_time lastMatchTime, data_status, data_status dataStatus, upload_user_id, upload_user_id uploadUserId, upload_user_name, upload_user_name uploadUserName, upload_time, upload_time uploadTime, latest_upload_user_id, latest_upload_user_id latestUploadUserId, latest_upload_user_name, latest_upload_user_name latestUploadUserName, latest_upload_time, latest_upload_time latestUploadTime, source_file_name, source_file_name sourceFileName, latest_source_file_name, latest_source_file_name latestSourceFileName, import_batch_id, import_batch_id importBatchId, latest_import_batch_id, latest_import_batch_id latestImportBatchId, source_row_number, source_row_number sourceRowNumber, latest_source_row_number, latest_source_row_number latestSourceRowNumber, create_by, create_by createBy, create_time, create_time createTime, update_by, update_by updateBy, update_time, update_time updateTime, remark, del_flag, del_flag delFlag
mapper.select: select from purchase_summary where del_flag='0' and document_supplier_id=#{documentSupplierId} and document_supplier_name like concat('%', #{documentSupplierName}, '%') and purchase_order_remark like concat('%', #{purchaseOrderRemark}, '%') and contract_remark like concat('%', #{contractRemark}, '%') and merchant_code like concat('%', #{merchantCode}, '%') and matched_logistics_no like concat('%', #{matchedLogisticsNo}, '%') and original_logistics_no like concat('%', #{originalLogisticsNo}, '%') and match_status=#{matchStatus} and data_status=#{dataStatus} order by summary_id desc
select from purchase_summary where summary_id=#{summaryId} and del_flag='0'
select from purchase_summary where active_unique_key=#{activeUniqueKey} and del_flag='0' limit 1

select count(1) totalCount, sum(match_status='SUCCESS') successCount, sum(match_status='NOT_FOUND') notFoundCount, sum(match_status='LOGISTICS_EMPTY') logisticsEmptyCount, sum(match_status='LOGISTICS_EMPTY') emptyCount, sum(match_status='SUPPLIER_NOT_FOUND') supplierNotFoundCount, sum(match_status='CONFLICT') conflictCount from purchase_summary where del_flag='0'
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_summary( document_supplier_id, document_supplier_name, active_unique_key, purchase_order_remark, contract_remark, merchant_code, purchase_quantity, matched_logistics_no, original_logistics_no, shipping_check_status, exception_reason, purchaser_remark, match_status, match_message, data_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, latest_upload_user_id, latest_upload_user_name, latest_upload_time, source_file_name, latest_source_file_name, import_batch_id, latest_import_batch_id, source_row_number, latest_source_row_number, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{documentSupplierId}, #{documentSupplierName}, #{activeUniqueKey}, #{purchaseOrderRemark}, #{contractRemark}, #{merchantCode}, #{purchaseQuantity}, #{matchedLogisticsNo}, #{originalLogisticsNo}, #{shippingCheckStatus}, #{exceptionReason}, #{purchaserRemark}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchMessage}, #{dataStatus}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, sysdate(), #{latestUploadUserId}, #{latestUploadUserName}, sysdate(), #{sourceFileName}, #{latestSourceFileName}, #{importBatchId}, #{latestImportBatchId}, #{sourceRowNumber}, #{latestSourceRowNumber}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update purchase_summary set contract_remark=if(contract_remark is null or contract_remark='', #{contractRemark}, contract_remark), original_logistics_no=if(original_logistics_no is null or original_logistics_no='', #{originalLogisticsNo}, original_logistics_no), shipping_check_status=if(shipping_check_status is null or shipping_check_status='', #{shippingCheckStatus}, shipping_check_status), exception_reason=if(exception_reason is null or exception_reason='', #{exceptionReason}, exception_reason), purchaser_remark=if(purchaser_remark is null or purchaser_remark='', #{purchaserRemark}, purchaser_remark), latest_upload_user_id=#{latestUploadUserId}, latest_upload_user_name=#{latestUploadUserName}, latest_upload_time=sysdate(), latest_source_file_name=#{latestSourceFileName}, latest_import_batch_id=#{latestImportBatchId}, latest_source_row_number=#{latestSourceRowNumber}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where summary_id=#{summaryId}

update purchase_summary set matched_order_id=#{matchedOrderId}, matched_logistics_no=#{matchedLogisticsNo}, match_status=#{matchStatus}, match_type=#{matchType}, match_message=#{matchMessage}, match_time=if(#{matchStatus}='SUCCESS', sysdate(), match_time), last_match_time=sysdate(), update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where summary_id=#{summaryId}
update purchase_summary set del_flag='2', active_unique_key=concat(active_unique_key, '|DEL|', summary_id), update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where summary_id in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_import_batch(batch_no, import_type, supplier_id, original_file_name, file_hash, sheet_name, batch_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, create_time) values(#{batchNo}, #{importType}, #{supplierId}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileHash}, #{sheetName}, 'PROCESSING', #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update purchase_import_batch set sheet_name=#{sheetName}, total_rows=#{totalRows}, success_rows=#{successRows}, duplicate_rows=#{duplicateRows}, updated_rows=#{updatedRows}, conflict_rows=#{conflictRows}, failed_rows=#{failedRows}, match_success_rows=#{matchSuccessRows}, batch_status=#{batchStatus}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, finish_time=sysdate() where batch_id=#{batchId}
mapper.select: select * from purchase_import_batch where batch_id=#{batchId}
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_import_detail(batch_id, source_row_number, business_key, raw_data_json, target_table, target_record_id, check_status, process_result, error_code, error_message, before_data_json, after_data_json, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, create_time) values(#{batchId}, #{sourceRowNumber}, #{businessKey}, #{rawDataJson}, #{targetTable}, #{targetRecordId}, #{checkStatus}, #{processResult}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{beforeDataJson}, #{afterDataJson}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select *, detail_id detailId, batch_id batchId, source_row_number sourceRowNumber, business_key businessKey, raw_data_json rawDataJson, target_table targetTable, target_record_id targetRecordId, check_status checkStatus, process_result processResult, error_code errorCode, error_message errorMessage, before_data_json beforeDataJson, after_data_json afterDataJson, upload_user_id uploadUserId, upload_user_name uploadUserName, upload_time uploadTime, create_time createTime from purchase_import_detail where batch_id=#{batchId} and process_result=#{processResult} order by source_row_number asc, detail_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_data_conflict(conflict_type, target_table, target_record_id, batch_id, detail_id, business_key, old_data_json, new_data_json, conflict_fields, conflict_status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{conflictType}, #{targetTable}, #{targetRecordId}, #{batchId}, #{detailId}, #{businessKey}, #{oldDataJson}, #{newDataJson}, #{conflictFields}, 'PENDING', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select c.*, c.conflict_id conflictId, c.conflict_type conflictType, c.target_table targetTable, c.target_record_id targetRecordId, c.batch_id batchId, c.detail_id detailId, c.business_key businessKey, c.old_data_json oldDataJson, c.new_data_json newDataJson, c.conflict_fields conflictFields, c.conflict_status conflictStatus, c.resolve_result resolveResult, c.resolve_user_id resolveUserId, c.resolve_user_name resolveUserName, c.resolve_time resolveTime, c.create_by createBy, c.create_time createTime, c.update_by updateBy, c.update_time updateTime, b.original_file_name sourceFileName, b.upload_user_name uploadUserName, b.upload_time uploadTime from purchase_data_conflict c left join purchase_import_batch b on b.batch_id=c.batch_id where 1=1 and c.conflict_status=#{conflictStatus} and c.target_table=#{targetTable} order by c.conflict_id desc

select c.*, c.conflict_id conflictId, c.conflict_type conflictType, c.target_table targetTable, c.target_record_id targetRecordId, c.batch_id batchId, c.detail_id detailId, c.business_key businessKey, c.old_data_json oldDataJson, c.new_data_json newDataJson, c.conflict_fields conflictFields, c.conflict_status conflictStatus, c.resolve_result resolveResult, c.resolve_user_id resolveUserId, c.resolve_user_name resolveUserName, c.resolve_time resolveTime, c.create_by createBy, c.create_time createTime, c.update_by updateBy, c.update_time updateTime from purchase_data_conflict c where c.conflict_id=#{conflictId}
mapper.update: update purchase_data_conflict set conflict_status='RESOLVED', resolve_result=#{resolveResult}, resolve_user_id=#{resolveUserId}, resolve_user_name=#{resolveUserName}, resolve_time=sysdate(), update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where conflict_id=#{conflictId}
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_match_log(summary_id, manual_order_id, supplier_id, order_no, old_logistics_no, new_logistics_no, match_status, match_type, match_message, operator_id, operator_name, create_time) values(#{summaryId}, #{manualOrderId}, #{supplierId}, #{orderNo}, #{oldLogisticsNo}, #{newLogisticsNo}, #{matchStatus}, #{matchType}, #{matchMessage}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate())

insert into purchase_field_change_log(target_table, target_record_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, change_type, batch_id, operator_id, operator_name, create_time) values(#{targetTable}, #{targetRecordId}, #{fieldName}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, 'UPDATE', #{batchId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate())
